mapper.select: SELECT module_code FROM sys_user_module_permission WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY module_code ASC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO sys_user_module_permission ( user_id, module_code, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by ) VALUES
( #{item.userId}, #{item.moduleCode}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.createBy}, #{item.updateTime}, #{item.updateBy} )
